positive: A celestial guardian figure composed of geometric lines and nebula dust, dramatically posed, symmetrical composition, strong contrast black and white with selective iridescent cyan and magenta accents. The figure is standing amidst abstract stardust patterns and overlapping celestial rings, symbolizing protection and wisdom. Clean silhouettes are paramount. High detail, minimalist vector illustration style combined with ethereal cosmic oil painting texture. Studio lighting, dramatic spotlighting, centralized focus, designed for apparel printing. Clean lines, vibrant glow, ultra-detailed, digital art, 8k.
negative: blur, noisy, artifact, watermark, text, logo, signature, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bad proportions, low resolution, grainy, copyright, muted colors
